channel.title: Genie on GENEATCG
channel.description: Recent content in Genie on GENEATCG

item.title: Remembering Genie
item.description: One year ago, we lost our beloved Genie. A tribute to a free and beautiful soul.

item.title: I Defended My PhD at ETH ZГјrich!
item.description: After 4.5 wonderful years at ETH ZГјrich, I successfully defended my PhD dissertation on the stability assessment of discrete shell structures.

item.title: Adopting Genie вҖ” жөӘжөӘеҲҘе“ӯ Podcast Ep. 36
item.description: Our story of adopting Genie from Taiwan to Switzerland, featured on the жөӘжөӘеҲҘе“ӯ (Lang Lang Don't Cry) podcast.
